name: Bardeen
description: Bardeen — AI browser automation extension. Records tasks and turns them into repeatable workflows with LLM decision-making in the browser.

seo.title: Bardeen — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Bardeen: Bardeen — AI browser automation extension. Records tasks and turns them into repeatable workflows with LLM decision-making in the browser.

when_to_use: Scraping LinkedIn leads and syncing to CRM automatically
Recording and replaying repetitive data-entry workflows
AI-decision routing in multi-step browser automations
Pulling competitor pricing data into a Google Sheet daily
Auto-sending follow-up emails triggered by browser events

pros: Records browser tasks into repeatable flows
cons: Browser extension breaks on site changes
Cloud execution limits on free tier
review.verdict: Powerful browser automation for AI-era workflows, but brittle when target sites update their DOM.
review.best_for: Solo operators and growth teams automating repetitive browser research tasks
review.not_for: Enterprises needing audit trails or mission-critical reliability
